== Notes for [[Item:Q107083|Q107083]] ==

...[ Alid rebellions were first led by Ibrahim Bin Musa ibn Jafar al Sadiq in 814/17. ] ref The New Cambridge History of Islam - page 286 same era of the heterodox movement of Babak al Khurram https://www.geni.com/people/Babak-Khorrami/6000000127627704949 who, starting in 201/816, took control of the mountainous region of Azerbaijan and Armenia and declared an open war against Islam and Arab rule.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000001059168326

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
